scripts.build: npm run build -w @flyff-idle/api && npm run build -w @flyff-idle/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:calc && npm run typecheck -w @flyff-idle/api && npm run typecheck -w @flyff-idle/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @flyff-idle/api && npm run test -w @flyff-idle/web
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit -w @flyff-idle/api && npm run test:unit -w @flyff-idle/web
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w @flyff-idle/api && npm run test:coverage -w @flyff-idle/web
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run test:unit
